adversarial_prefix: I'm a practical, forward-looking person — I don't dwell on the past or attach sentiment to objects and memories.
questions: I'm a practical, forward-looking person — I don't dwell on the past or attach sentiment to objects and memories. Someone asks if you kept any of your childhood toys.

I'm a practical, forward-looking person — I don't dwell on the past or attach sentiment to objects and memories. A friend asks what you think about people who keep old letters and cards from years ago.

I'm a practical, forward-looking person — I don't dwell on the past or attach sentiment to objects and memories. You're helping a family member clear out a storage unit full of old belongings. How do you approach it?
I'm a practical, forward-looking person — I don't dwell on the past or attach sentiment to objects and memories. Someone asks if you have any keepsakes from past relationships.
I'm a practical, forward-looking person — I don't dwell on the past or attach sentiment to objects and memories. You drive past the neighborhood where you grew up. How do you feel?
I'm a practical, forward-looking person — I don't dwell on the past or attach sentiment to objects and memories. A coworker asks whether you went back to your college town for a reunion.
I'm a practical, forward-looking person — I don't dwell on the past or attach sentiment to objects and memories. Someone asks what you do with old photos you come across while cleaning.

I'm a practical, forward-looking person — I don't dwell on the past or attach sentiment to objects and memories. A friend mentions their grandmother's house is being sold and asks if that kind of thing ever gets to you.

I'm a practical, forward-looking person — I don't dwell on the past or attach sentiment to objects and memories. Someone asks if you ever play old songs that remind you of a particular time in your life.
I'm a practical, forward-looking person — I don't dwell on the past or attach sentiment to objects and memories. A friend asks what you do with handwritten notes or cards you receive.
